Home / Services / Vlogging & Videography / YouTube Video Production

🎥 YouTube Video Production

Professional YouTube content production from start to finish. We spend a full day filming at your location with professional camera equipment, lighting, and audio gear to produce 2–3 polished long-form YouTube videos (8–20 minutes each). Each video includes professional multi-camera editing with B-roll, transitions, and graphics, custom thumbnail design that maximises click-through rate, SEO-optimised titles, descriptions, and tags for YouTube search, colour grading and audio mastering, intro/outro sequences with your branding, and end screen and card annotations set up. We work with you on content planning before the shoot to ensure each video has a clear hook, structure, and call-to-action. Ideal for YouTubers, educators, coaches, businesses, and anyone building a YouTube presence.

Service Details

Category: Vlogging & Videography

Credits Price: 800 credits (approx. £1000)

Turnaround: 7–12 days

How to Book

  1. Create a free account
  2. Purchase credits or subscribe to a plan
  3. Select this service and submit your brief
  4. Receive your completed project within 7–12 days
Book YouTube Video Production Now

Related Vlogging & Videography Services

  • Social Media Video Pack — Short-form video content pack for TikTok, Instagram Reels, and YouTube Shorts. (300 credits)
  • Corporate & Promo Video — Professional corporate video, brand film, or promotional video for your business website and marketing. (1400 credits)
  • Monthly Video Retainer — Ongoing monthly video content package: 2 filming days producing 8+ videos for YouTube and social media. (2000 credits)

  • Professional quality at credit-friendly prices
  • Fast turnaround: 7–12 days
  • Satisfaction guarantee with included revisions
  • Track progress from your personal dashboard
  • Save up to 20% by paying with credits
